name: Metal stele
description: A floor to ceiling, shining column.  A massive face with a gaping jaw is cast upon it.  Inside the mouth are several pre-fabricated slots.

effect.title:
You see before you a floor to ceiling, shining column.

A massive face with a gaping jaw is cast upon it.

Inside the mouth are several pre-fabricated slots.

The slots are clearly labeled:
descriptions: Looks like a standard hacksaw will fit.
Looks like a standard screwdriver will fit.
You don't know what a gravimetrically aware jig is, but maybe you can find one in the labyrinthine structures?
Looks like a standard wrench will fit.
Looks like a standard extension cord will fit.
Looks like a standard nut and bolt will fit.
Looks like a standard piece of sheet metal will fit.

Looks like a standard pipe will fit.
